actions: Apply Urea or Nitrogen-rich organic compost.
Apply Rock Phosphate (ERP) near the manure circle.
Apply Muriate of Potash (MOP) as recommended.
Use ammonium-based fertilizers to lower pH.
Increase irrigation frequency and use mulching.
disclaimer: Decision Support Only: Professional CRI laboratory or leaf analysis is mandatory for final decision making.
further_action: Apply Urea or Nitrogen-rich organic compost. | Apply Rock Phosphate (ERP) near the manure circle. | Apply Muriate of Potash (MOP) as recommended. | Use ammonium-based fertilizers to lower pH. | General fertilization recommended. | Increase irrigation frequency and use mulching. | Monitor for slow nutrient uptake.

actions: Apply Urea or Nitrogen-rich organic compost.
Apply Muriate of Potash (MOP) as recommended.
Apply Dolomite (1-2 kg per tree) to correct acidity.
Increase irrigation frequency and use mulching.
disclaimer: Decision Support Only: Professional CRI laboratory or leaf analysis is mandatory for final decision making.
further_action: Apply Urea or Nitrogen-rich organic compost. | Apply Muriate of Potash (MOP) as recommended. | Apply Dolomite (1-2 kg per tree) to correct acidity. | General fertilization recommended. | Increase irrigation frequency and use mulching. | Monitor for slow nutrient uptake.

actions: Apply Urea or Nitrogen-rich organic compost.
Suspend phosphorus application for one season.
Apply Muriate of Potash (MOP) as recommended.
Use ammonium-based fertilizers to lower pH.
Increase irrigation frequency and use mulching.
disclaimer: Decision Support Only: Professional CRI laboratory or leaf analysis is mandatory for final decision making.
